scope: Pass B expansion over the statically known Uptick REST API resources already listed in the bundle plus the legacy read streams. Uptick public docs state that v2 implements REST with JsonAPI, that /api/v2.x/ lists tenant endpoints, and that every endpoint exposes OPTIONS metadata for available fields; this bundle covers all stable list resources available without tenant-specific OPTIONS metadata and excludes mutation shapes because their request schemas are tenant/resource-specific rather than statically published.

excluded.reason: Uptick publishes tenant-specific request schemas through each endpoint OPTIONS response rather than a static public write contract, so this bundle cannot safely declare a dialect write action for task creation without live tenant metadata.
Generic resource creation is documented as tenant self-descriptive via OPTIONS metadata; no stable public request body schema is available for declarative writes across tenants.
Generic resource replacement requires tenant endpoint OPTIONS metadata and per-resource writable field rules that are not available as static public documentation.
Generic partial update requires tenant endpoint OPTIONS metadata and per-resource writable field rules that are not available as static public documentation.
Generic deletion is destructive field-service data removal and Uptick does not publish a stable global delete contract suitable for a declarative reverse-ETL action.
